template.name: excerpt
template.label: Excerpt
template.description: Short summary shown on blog listings and in search results

template.name: image
template.label: Hero Image
template.description: Path to the hero image, e.g. ~/assets/images/blog/my-post-01.webp

template.name: draft
template.label: Draft
template.description: Set to true to hide this post from the site

template.name: location
template.label: Location
template.description: Building location — renders a Google Maps embed at the bottom of the post

fields.name: address
fields.label: Street Address
fields.description: Full address shown as text and used as the map search query

fields.name: lat
fields.label: Latitude
fields.description: Decimal latitude for a precise map pin (e.g. 34.0928)

fields.name: lng
fields.label: Longitude
fields.description: Decimal longitude for a precise map pin (e.g. -118.3012)

fields.name: canonical
fields.label: Canonical URL
fields.description: The original URL on riplosangeles.com, e.g. https://www.riplosangeles.com/post/my-slug
